strategy_criteria_summary: USA-listed companies reporting earnings next week, sorted by market cap. This deliberately broad Finviz screen preserves the top five visible rows; optionability, liquidity, trend, news, fundamentals, and contract quality are validated downstream.
scoring_reasons: trend alignment was clearly supportive|market/sector environment was clearly supportive|price structure was clearly supportive|No usable option contract was selected.
decision_reasoning: No name clears the recommend bar. MP has the strongest momentum (+33% 20d, +25% RS vs SPY) but IV is extreme (0.98–1.49) and the pre-filter itself flagged IV crush risk into a post-earnings expiry — poor long-premium setup. BROS and SYM show wide spreads, missing greeks, and far-OTM strikes. GME offers the most tradable structure: ATM strike, ~0.51 delta, modest IV (0.55), tight spread, and trend/market/price structure all tagged supportive. However, momentum is only modest (+9.9% 20d, RS +1.3%), news coverage is sparse, and earnings timing (BMO/AMC) is unknown, which per §17 blocks a confident recommend. Watchlist the GME 25C 05-15 pending earnings-timing confirmation and a cleaner catalyst read.
